_doc: English UI strings — per P05-T01. Mirror in vi.json.

refusal.outOfScope: I don't have a metric for that question. Try rephrasing.
refusal.sensitive: Your role doesn't permit this question. Request elevation if needed.
refusal.lowConfidence: I'm not confident enough to answer. This has been routed to a reviewer.

hitl.banner: Your question requires reviewer approval. Reviewer SLA: 30 minutes.
